variants: Solenne Herve was born in Driftleaf Warren, where her passion for chocolates began in her childhood. She is currently employed at Cinder Sparrow Chocolates, a company renowned for its artisanal confections. Residing in Starcaller Crescent, Solenne has made a name for herself as both a chocolate maker and a creative inventor. Among her notable achievements, she was awarded the Lotus Veil Emblem for her contributions to the chocolate industry. In addition to her work, she authored the innovative book titled Moonfern Storage Panel, exploring new techniques for food preservation.
